Schedule an Onboarding Demo & Start Trial

Ready to transition from spreadsheet chaos? Complete our simple registration form to book a personal onboarding demo and activate your 14-day free trial.

✓

14-Day Free EvaluationExplore the complete platform. Base corporate fees and property add-on charges are suspended during trial evaluation.

✓

Guided Spreadsheet SetupOur technical support leads stand ready to assist you in connecting your company's master Google Sheet rosters safely.

✓

No Credit Cards NeededTrial evaluation accounts are activated instantly. Provide billing details only when you decide to proceed with active rosters.

TidyFlowOperations Hub

Cleaning company software for modern janitorial teams. Connect field operations, rota sheets, GPS-verified hours, payroll exports, and client proof on one offline-first cloud platform.
